reasoning: The chart configuration fails to answer the core part of the business question ('Wieviel Umsatz...'). The question asks for the revenue in the years 2021-2024, which implies an annual aggregation (total per year). However, the provided chart displays monthly data points overlaid on top of each other without grouping or stacking. This makes it impossible to read the total annual revenue directly from the visualization. Furthermore, because multiple bars are plotted at the same x-coordinates (months) without offsetting or transparency settings defined in the config, they will likely occlude one another, rendering the chart unreadable and misleading. A bar chart with 'Month' as the X-axis is inappropriate for showing yearly totals; a simple column chart with Years on the X-axis would be required.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the data by Year first to calculate the total revenue for each year (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024), then plot a single bar per year using a bar chart where the X-axis represents the Year.
